title: 2025-11-12 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 4.19
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-11-12: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 4.19/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-11-12, the score printed 4.19/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
